validated_commands.build_note: Full workspace build requires goose git dep (network blocked in CI); persistence crate builds/tests independently. sccache not available in sandbox - unset RUSTC_WRAPPER. cargo check -p opengoose-web works and compiles the full dependency graph including goose.

open_prs.title: [Perf Improver] Add list_sessions benchmark to session_store bench suite
open_prs.note: Submitted 2026-03-19. Adds bench_list_sessions to session_store bench (10/100/500 rows). Baselines: 10→4.2µs, 100→46.3µs, 500→228.4µs. Benchmark-only change. 293 tests pass.

merged_prs.title: [Perf Improver] count_runs_by_status() in health metrics — fix 200-run cap + N→4 rows
[Perf Improver] count_runs() instead of list_runs(None, MAX) in dashboard handler (O(N) → O(1))
[Perf Improver] SQLite PRAGMA tuning: ~12x write throughput improvement in WAL mode
[Perf Improver] Add Criterion benchmarks to opengoose-persistence
[Perf Improver] Atomic append_message: single WAL commit per message write
[Perf Improver] SQLite mmap_size PRAGMA: memory-mapped reads (128 MiB)
[Perf Improver] INSERT RETURNING in schedule/trigger/plugin create (−1 SQL round-trip each)
[Perf Improver] INSERT RETURNING in WorkItemStore::create (−1 SQL round-trip)
[Perf Improver] Add updated_at indexes for listing/dashboard queries (O(N log N) → O(LIMIT))
[Perf Improver] Add OrchestrationStore Criterion benchmarks (measurement baseline for index PR #321)
[Perf Improver] combine current_metrics() 3 SQL queries into one atomic statement
merged_prs.note: Merged directly into main. MetricsRow replaces CountRow. Single scalar-subquery stmt. ~2.5x faster.

optimization_backlog.title: Cache recent session history in memory
optimization_backlog.notes: load_history() hits SQLite on every Goose agent invocation. An LRU cache per session would avoid repeated reads for TUI refresh and streaming engine. dashmap already in workspace deps BUT NOT in persistence Cargo.toml. Per AGENTS.md, adding new deps requires issue discussion first. Create issue before attempting.

optimization_backlog.title: Batch load_history for live_sessions() N+1 pattern
optimization_backlog.notes: live_sessions() in sessions/loader.rs calls load_history(&key, 40) once per session (up to 24 queries for limit=24). Could batch via WHERE session_key IN (...) with ROW_NUMBER() window function. Low priority: 24 queries ~= 24*6µs = 144µs total, acceptable for page renders.

perf_notes: Full workspace build downloads goose from GitHub (network blocked). Use -p opengoose-persistence for local work. Unset RUSTC_WRAPPER (sccache not available in sandbox).
cargo check -p opengoose-web succeeds (with network) and validates the full dependency graph including dashboard.rs.
SQLite synchronous=NORMAL in WAL mode is safe and ~12x faster for per-commit writes. PR #39 merged.
libsqlite3-sys with bundled feature - SQLite version is bundled, no system SQLite dependency.
Criterion benchmarks baselines (in-memory WAL): append_message ~15-17µs, get_active_team ~1µs, load_history(10) ~6µs, load_history(50) ~28-30µs, set_active_team ~9µs.
In-memory SQLite doesn't show mmap benefit - file-based workloads gain from mmap_size on repeated page reads.
returning_clauses_for_sqlite_3_35 feature already in workspace - INSERT RETURNING works and is used widely.
As of 2026-03-13, all INSERT+last_insert_rowid() patterns in persistence crate have been replaced with INSERT RETURNING.
sessions and orchestration_runs tables now have updated_at indexes (merged PR #321).
dashboard.rs i64::MAX issue now fully fixed: index from PR #321 + count_runs() from merged PR #326.
count_runs_by_status() uses Diesel .group_by().select((status, count(id))).load::<(String, i64)>() then parses client-side. Returns 4 rows for any N runs. Merged PR #329.
AlertStore::current_metrics() now uses single scalar-subquery statement (merged into main 2026-03-18). MetricsRow replaces CountRow. Atomic snapshot, ~2.5x faster.
messages table has idx_messages_session(session_key, created_at) - covers load_history() filter+sort.
Adding dashmap to opengoose-persistence requires discussion first (new dep per AGENTS.md policy).
list_sessions benchmark baselines (in-memory WAL, PR perf-assist/session-listing-bench): 10→4.2µs, 100→46.3µs, 500→228.4µs. Linear scaling, consistent with idx_sessions_updated_at index scan.
issue #330 is a stale duplicate of PR #329 (count_runs_by_status) — created when a second PR creation attempt failed. Commented 2026-03-19 to suggest closing.
